channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Iranians divided over Mojtaba Khamenei becoming supreme leader

Matched Titles:

- Iran's new supreme leader explained: Who is Mojtaba Khamenei?
- Iran’s Security Establishment Celebrates Mojtaba Khamenei’s Selection

- Ali Khamenei’s son Mojtaba chosen as Iran’s new supreme leader
- World reacts to appointment of Mojtaba Khamenei as Iran’s supreme leader

- Missile in Deadly Iranian School Strike Appears to Be U.S.-Made, Photos Taken by Iran Show

- U.S. Tomahawk Hit Naval Base Beside Iranian School, Video Shows

- Video Captures Apparent Strike Near Boys’ School in Iran
- Investigation further suggests it was U.S. that struck Iranian school, killing 165

- Iranian school hit by Tomahawk missile implicating US in strike, video footage shows - report
- New missile video puts spotlight on US over Iran school attack
- Video shows US Tomahawk missile hit base next to bombed Iranian school
- Investigation further suggests it was the US that struck an Iranian school, killing 165
- Investigation further suggests it was the US that struck an Iranian school, killing 165
- New video suggests US' Tomahawk missile may be behind Iran school attack that killed 165
- US Tomahawk missile filmed hitting near Iranian girls’ school – media (VIDEO)

item.title: Iran war could end 'pretty quickly': Trump
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Donald Trump says Iran war could be over soon, but oil disruption would trigger harsher U.S. strikes
- Middle East crisis live: Trump claims Iran war will be over ‘very soon’ but Tehran says it will determine when
- Iran says oil blockade will continue until attacks end, Trump threatens to hit harder
- Trump says it's too soon to discuss seizing Iran oil
- Trump says war may end soon, IRGC says Tehran will decide when
- Iran says oil blockade will continue until attacks end, Trump threatens to hit harder
- Iran says oil blockade will continue until attacks end, Trump threatens to hit harder
- Trump says war with Iran could be over 'pretty quickly'
- Iran war may end ‘pretty quickly’: What Trump told Republicans
- Iran war live: Trump says conflict will be over soon; Gulf attacks continue
- Trump says US-Israeli war on Iran will be over ‘very soon’

- 'It's going to finish pretty quickly' US President Donald Trump says of Operation Epic Fury
- After global economy shudders, Trump zigzags on whether war will end soon
- US Iran war news LIVE: Iran says won't allow 'one litre' of oil export after Trump predicts end of war
- Asia markets rebound, oil dives as Trump says Iran war could end soon

- Trump Vows Harsher Strikes on Iran If It Disrupts Global Oil Supply
- Iran war could end “pretty quickly”:Trump
- Trump says Iran war could end 'soon' as Middle East conflict rattles markets
- Trump Says Iran War Will End 'Very Soon'
- Trump says war on Iran could be ‘short-term excursion’
- Trump says Iran war will end 'very soon'
- Trump says Iran war will end 'very soon'
- TRUMP LIVE | 'Iran war going to be ended very soon': POTUS makes big announcement on Op Epic Fury
- Trump says Iran war 'going to be ended soon'
- Trump Signals War With Iran May End Soon—Even as He Vows Not to Relent
- Trump says Iran war ‘pretty much’ over, progressing ahead of schedule
- FirstFT: Oil falls below $90 as Trump suggests Iran war could be over soon
- Trump hints end of Iran war in sight, saying operations ‘very complete’
- 'War pretty much complete': Trump says military campaign against Iran 'ahead of schedule'
- Trump Says War in Iran Is ‘Very Complete,’ Far Ahead of Schedule
